# Capability Boundary

Template for **Layer 4** (`assess-risk`). See `docs/specs/capability-boundary.md` (repo map) and `kurosawa-thin-harness-architecture.md` §12.4.

## Allowed Capabilities

## Protected Capabilities Touched?

- [ ] production deployment
- [ ] database migration
- [ ] secret read/write
- [ ] IAM / permission change
- [ ] cloud resource creation / deletion
- [ ] billing / quota
- [ ] destructive command
- [ ] production / master data access
- [ ] auth / authorization logic

## Owner Approval

- required | not required
